query:
-- Step 1: Extend users table with new columns
ALTER TABLE users
  ADD COLUMN phone VARCHAR(20) AFTER email,
  ADD COLUMN password VARCHAR(256) AFTER phone,
  ADD COLUMN department VARCHAR(100) AFTER role,
  ADD COLUMN jobTitle VARCHAR(100) AFTER department,
  ADD COLUMN status ENUM('active', 'disabled', 'pending') DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL AFTER jobTitle,
  ADD COLUMN mustChangePassword INT DEFAULT 1 AFTER status,
  ADD COLUMN failedLoginAttempts INT DEFAULT 0 AFTER mustChangePassword,
  ADD COLUMN lockedUntil TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER failedLoginAttempts,
  ADD COLUMN invitedBy INT AFTER lockedUntil,
  ADD COLUMN lastPasswordChangedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER invitedBy;

-- Step 2: Modify role enum to support 8 roles
ALTER TABLE users MODIFY COLUMN role ENUM('super_admin','admin','ops_manager','ops_specialist','product_dev','finance','purchaser','designer') DEFAULT 'ops_specialist' NOT NULL;

-- Step 3: Make openId nullable (password users won't have openId)
ALTER TABLE users MODIFY COLUMN openId VARCHAR(64) NULL;

-- Step 4: Migrate existing OAuth users - set owner as super_admin, others as admin
UPDATE users SET role = 'super_admin', mustChangePassword = 0, status = 'active' WHERE openId = (SELECT val FROM (SELECT COALESCE(NULL, openId) as val FROM users LIMIT 1) tmp);

-- Step 5: Create login_logs table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS login_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT,
  loginMethod ENUM('password', 'oauth') NOT NULL,
  loginIdentifier VARCHAR(320),
  ipAddress VARCHAR(45),
  userAgent VARCHAR(512),
  success INT NOT NULL,
  failReason VARCHAR(100),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_userId (userId),
  INDEX idx_createdAt (createdAt)
);

-- Step 6: Create usage_stats table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS usage_stats (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT,
  statDate VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  aiCallCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  aiTokensUsed BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  scraperCallCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  storageUsedBytes BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  apiCallCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  loginCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uk_user_date (userId, statDate),
  INDEX idx_statDate (statDate)
);

-- Step 7: Create kb_sync_logs table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS kb_sync_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  syncDirection ENUM('push', 'pull') NOT NULL,
  resourceType ENUM('kb_product','kb_listing','kb_image_set','kb_video','kb_skill') NOT NULL,
  resourceId INT NOT NULL,
  remoteResourceId INT,
  syncStatus ENUM('pending','synced','conflict','failed') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  conflictDetail TEXT,
  syncedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_resourceType (resourceType),
  INDEX idx_syncStatus (syncStatus)
);

-- Step 8: Create project_assignments table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS project_assignments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId INT NOT NULL,
  projectType ENUM('dev_project', 'listing_project') DEFAULT 'dev_project' NOT NULL,
  assignedUserId INT NOT NULL,
  assignedBy INT NOT NULL,
  permission ENUM('read', 'write') DEFAULT 'read' NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uk_project_user (projectId, projectType, assignedUserId)
);

-- Step 9: Create sop_access_grants table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sop_access_grants (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  skillLevel ENUM('intermediate', 'advanced') NOT NULL,
  grantedBy INT NOT NULL,
  expiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uk_user_level (userId, skillLevel)
);

-- Step 10: Create remote_usage_snapshots table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS remote_usage_snapshots (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  instanceId VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  instanceName VARCHAR(255),
  snapshotDate VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  totalUsers INT DEFAULT 0,
  activeUsers INT DEFAULT 0,
  aiCallCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  aiTokensUsed BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  scraperCallCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  storageUsedBytes BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  apiCallCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  detailJson TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uk_instance_date (instanceId, snapshotDate)
);
